title: stellaria borealis var. simcoei
intro: Stellaria borealis var. simcoei, also known as the Simcoe Starwort, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family and is native to British Columbia, Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. The Simcoe Starwort can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
